arts.ttl: 'The problem is' - Pep Guardiola hints at future Man City changes
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about what is next for the club after signing on for another two years

arts.ttl: Arne Slot gives Alisson injury update ahead of Real Madrid and Man City clashes
arts.sum: Liverpool have been without their No.1 goalkeeper Alisson for a number of weeks with Caoimhin Kelleher deputising in his absence while Arne Slot has also missed striker Diogo Jota

arts.ttl: Five challenges ahead for Guardiola and Man City
arts.sum: With Pep Guardiola deciding to stay at Manchester City for another two seasons, BBC Sport looks at the challenges ahead for the club.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals stance on lengthy Rodrigo Bentancur ban
arts.sum: Rodrigo Bentancur was handed a seven-match ban and £100,000 fine by the FA for a racist remark made about Tottenham team-mate Son Heung-min.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals why he 'couldn't' leave Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola reveals how much Manchester City means to him after signing a contract extension.

arts.ttl: Romero wait and no Maddison in Spurs team Postecoglou must pick vs Man City
arts.sum: Gold's team: Vicario; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Udogie; Sarr, Bissouma, Kulusevski; Johnson, Solanke, Son. Spurs had to put together a makeshift central defence last season at the Etihad Stadium with Ben Davies and Emerson Royal pairing up and the former could be called on again with Radu Dragusin this time if Cristian Romero is not considered fit enough to start.

arts.ttl: Premier League clubs approve APT rule changes in blow to Manchester City
arts.sum: Associated party transaction changes approved by 16-4 Aston Villa, Newcastle, Nottingham Forest side with City Premier League clubs approved changes to associated party transaction (APT) rules on Friday in the face of opposition led by Manchester City. The alterations were swiftly approved by 16 votes to four, with Aston Villa, Newcastle and Nottingham Forest standing with City. Clubs were asked at a shareholder meeting in central London to pass modest changes to rules relating to deals when they generate income from sources related to their ownership. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur star's agent 'convinced' Ruben Amorim 'will attempt to sign his client' for Man United
arts.sum: Pedro Porro's agent is reportedly 'convinced' that Ruben Amorim will attempt to bring the Tottenham Hotspur defender to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Rodri drops HUGE Real Madrid transfer hint
arts.sum: Rodri left La Liga to join Man City in 2019, but The Transfers Podcast has been told that he is open to the idea of returning to Spain and Real Madrid appear to be the frontrunners for his signature, despite his history with their fierce rivals Atletico. Real Madrid are expected to submit a formal offer for the Man City superstar next summer, and we have been informed that Pep Guardiola’s side are aware of Los Blancos’ interest in the 28-year-old.

arts.ttl: Charges verdict, transfer plan - How national media reacted to Pep Guardiola's Man City contract
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola looks set for a further two-years after he put pen to paper on a new deal with the Premier League champions
